name: Bullseye Golf Wrx LLC
about: Bullseye Golf Wrx is an indoor golf simulator venue in Concord, North Carolina, featuring four bays equipped with Foresight GC Hawk technology. The facility offers a climate-controlled environment for golfers to play on virtual world-famous courses, with the technology providing accurate and consistent data to help players dial in their club skills. Alongside golf simulation, the venue includes a social atmosphere with a full bar, multiple televisions for sporting events, and club building services.
why_golfers_like_it: Highly accurate Foresight GC Hawk technology for precise club data
Access to a wide selection of world-famous virtual golf courses
Social atmosphere with full bar and multiple TVs for sporting events
Family-friendly environment accommodating all ages and skill levels
Comprehensive club building and customization services available

food_and_drink.notes: Beer, seltzer, and other malt beverages available

simulator_hardware.notes: Four bays equipped with this high-end radar launch monitor

faq.question: Do I need to bring my own clubs?
faq.answer: The venue does not explicitly state if club rentals are available, but it does offer club building and customization services.

faq.question: Can I bring my own food or drinks?
faq.answer: The venue offers its own beer, seltzer, and other malt beverages, along with light snacks. There is no mention of BYOB policy.

faq.question: How long does it typically take to play 18 holes?
faq.answer: The website does not provide specific timing information for 18 holes.

faq.question: Is the venue kid-friendly?
faq.answer: Yes, Bullseye Golf Wrx is family-friendly and welcomes players of all ages, including children.
